comment: tactical-violent bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical. RE-BASELINED in batch 12 (light-as-grace, the second-lantern redesign; human sign-off 2026-07-24). Violence is now the LOSING reliable strategy: a kill-heavy descent anchors the McGuffin's mood low, so she shines a small/dark radius on the climb and the fighter dies in the dark after the torch runs out (deaths_dark 762 — up sharply; the mechanism of the flip). Measured: wins 2185/5000 (43.7%), deaths_combat 2053, deaths_dark 762, stuck 0, kills 93886, spared 2802. Design target: violence high-30s-to-low-40s (T1's kill-light penalty caps it) — landed 43.7% on the starting [TUNE] values. Band brackets the measured value with regression headroom. Final batch-12 [TUNE] values are documented in tests/tactical-pacifist-band.json's comment. Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
